ui.title: SCF Agreement Summary
ui.desc: Active SCF agreement references, client IDs, and limits.

data.sql: SELECT C_MAIN_REF as "Agreement_Ref", FA_ANCHOR_ID as "Customer_ID", FA_LMT_CCY as "Currency", FA_LMT_AMT as "Limit_Amount", TO_CHAR(D_CREA_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "Start_Date" FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'M' AND ROWNUM <= 5
